mapper.select: select id,use_id,monday, tuesday,wednesday,thursday, friday,saturday,sunday,delete_flag from user_course where use_id = #{useId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
select use_id,course_html,start_time from user_course left join user on user_course.use_id = user.id where course_html is not null and grade between year(now())-4 and year(now())
mapper.update: update user_course set monday = #{userCourse.monday,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tuesday = #{userCourse.tuesday,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wednesday = #{userCourse.wednesday,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, thursday = #{userCourse.thursday,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, friday = #{userCourse.friday,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, saturday = #{userCourse.saturday,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sunday = #{userCourse.sunday,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{userCourse.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

update user_course set delete_flag = 1 where use_id in
#{item,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.delete: delete from user_course where (monday is null and thursday is null and tuesday is null and wednesday is null and friday is null and saturday is null and sunday is null) or delete_flag = 1;
mapper.update: update user_course set monday = null,tuesday = null,wednesday = null,thursday = null,friday = null,saturday = null,sunday = null where course_html is not null
update user_course set monday = null,tuesday = null,wednesday = null,thursday = null,friday = null,saturday = null,sunday = null where course_html is not null and use_id = #{userId}
